name: Talon 1 Acquisition Corp. Warrant
summary: Talon 1 Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on identifying and acquiring businesses, and its warrants represent the right to purchase shares of the combined company after a successful acquisition. Talon 1 Acquisition Corp. is headquartered in New York.
